title: Isaac Sim and AUV RL literature around Learning to Swim
task: Find and stage five papers related to Learning to Swim that support Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab plus AUV reinforcement-learning research, prioritizing AUV RL, 6-DOF control, zero-shot sim-to-real transfer, domain randomization, and underwater simulation platforms or benchmarks.
domain_scope: Autonomous underwater vehicles and underwater robotics, with emphasis on reinforcement-learning control, 6-DOF thruster-driven control, sim-to-real transfer, GPU or high-fidelity simulation, and underwater simulator or benchmark platforms useful for comparing the Isaac Lab / Isaac Sim direction.
specific_questions: Which AUV reinforcement-learning papers most directly extend or contrast with Learning to Swim's 6-DOF, zero-shot, massively parallel simulation route?
Which underwater simulator or benchmark papers best explain the platform gap that Learning to Swim fills with Isaac Lab / Isaac Sim?
Which five papers are the highest-value candidates for Paper Wiki deposition to support reproduction planning, platform selection, and an AUV RL research map?
exclusions: generic reinforcement learning without AUV or underwater robotics
underwater acoustic communication or sensor-network papers without control relevance
pure perception datasets unless they define an underwater simulator useful for control research
papers already present as formal reference pages in the target wiki
broad surveys except at most one simulator review used as a platform map

review_policy.notes: Keep at most one simulator/platform review if it is useful for mapping HoloOcean, DAVE, UNav-Sim, Stonefish, MARUS, or similar platforms; otherwise prefer original method/platform papers.

source_scope.notes: Use Paper Source configured providers and paper-search-mcp; use targeted DOI/arXiv/title verification only after candidate identity exists.

output_goal.notes: Stage five high-value papers for Paper Wiki deposition into D:\paper-research-wiki, then report Paper Source record readiness.

unknowns: Some candidate PDFs may require manual download or publisher access.
Final selected five may change after Paper Source ranking, duplicate checks, and acquisition gates.
The target vault currently contains legacy _epi artifacts; do not run a wholesale _epi to _paper_source migration unless separately confirmed.

field_sources.title: user request and confirmed scope
field_sources.domain_scope: user request, existing Learning to Swim wiki page, and pre-search candidate evidence
field_sources.keywords: user request, existing wiki page terms, and Paper Source MCP pre-search
field_sources.exclusions: existing wiki duplicate check, Paper Source profile, and user goal
field_sources.output_goal: user request to deposit into wiki
field_sources.unknowns: current vault state and acquisition constraints
